decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a CEPAC-International microsimulation model for genotype-testing cost-effectiveness but does not identify it as agent- or individual-based.
Calibrates and uses a spatial agent-based Ebola transmission model to estimate transmission and intervention effects in Liberia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of a spatial agent-based model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses agent-based models to simulate behavioral education, vaccination, and social distancing effects on influenza transmission.
Tutorial explains agent-based modelling concepts and supplies a simple NetLogo model for infectious-disease screening economic evaluation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit tutorial and methodological introduction to agent-based modelling.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a microsimulation of HIV-serodiscordant couples but does not explicitly identify an agent- or individual-based design.
Uses a Markov microsimulation model for MRSA cost-effectiveness without explicitly describing an agent- or individual-based model.
Uses the stochastic microsimulation model STDSIM but does not explicitly equate it with the exact agent-/individual-based concept.
Proposes a hybrid network-patch method that extends existing agent-based models to mosquito-borne pathogens.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development extending agent-based models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an HCV natural-history microsimulation without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Conducts an HCV microsimulation but does not explicitly describe the design as agent- or individual-based.
Uses an agent-based epidemic simulation of sexual networks and behaviors to study HIV transmission in Taiwan.
Describes a general stochastic agent-based framework for epidemics in dynamic, multi-relational social networks and illustrates it with HIV.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit general framework development for agent-based epidemic simulation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a Markov microsimulation for probiotic impact without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based model.
Develops and uses an agent-based measles model with synthetic households, schools, workplaces, and neighborhoods to assess control measures.
Uses a state-transition microsimulation for HBV screening without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Benchmarks data structures, sorting, scheduling, workload size, and parallelization for infectious-disease agent-based model runtime.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance evaluation and optimization of agent-based model implementations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Specifies a microsimulation of citrus disease spread but does not explicitly identify it as agent- or individual-based.
Uses an agent-based malaria model to characterize the infectious reservoir and test mass screen-and-treat campaigns.
Develops and runs an agent-based Ebola simulator on national transmission networks to estimate epidemic parameters and projections.
Develops an agent-based discrete-time dairy-herd model and uses it to assess Johne's disease control and cost-effectiveness.
Uses the ARAMIS Monte Carlo individual simulation and microsimulation terminology without explicitly identifying the model as agent- or individual-based.
Uses a Markov microsimulation for Crohn's disease prophylaxis without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Develops and calibrates an agent-based pertussis transmission model to explain age-specific incidence trends.
Uses an agent-based framework to estimate vector-host contact rates for Trypanosoma cruzi transmission.
Builds and tests a parallelizable sliding-region algorithm to improve computational efficiency of large-scale agent-based simulations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit computational implementation for scaling agent-based models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses STDSIM microsimulation without explicitly identifying it as an agent- or individual-based model.
Explicitly equates microsimulation with agent-based models and calibrates three such malaria models to prevalence and incidence data.
Uses census-informed agent-based influenza models to examine poverty-related inequalities in attack rates.
Uses the Agent-based Pathogen Kinetics model to forecast hepatitis C prevalence and demographic change among people who inject drugs.
Develops WORMSIM as a new generalized individual-based modelling framework for helminth transmission and control.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a generalized individual-based framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based microsimulation of HCV transmission and disease progression to evaluate prison screening and treatment.
Uses a microsimulation transmission model for Ebola interventions but does not explicitly identify it as agent- or individual-based.
Develops a hybrid network-patch agent-based approach by coupling mosquito patches with an existing human ABM.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of a hybrid agent-based model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an individual-based dynamic sexual and injecting-network model to compare alternative HIV transmission formulations.
Uses agent-based modeling software to simulate gonorrhea and HIV prevalence under PrEP uptake scenarios.
Compares a deterministic model with a microsimulation network model but never explicitly identifies the latter as agent- or individual-based.
Establishes EPICE-HIV as a new multi-paradigm framework combining within-host microsimulation with an agent-based sexual-contact network.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a new framework containing an agent-based component.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and simulates an individual-based model coupling within-host and between-host HIV dynamics in Chinese MSM.
Uses the MISCAN-Cervix microsimulation but does not explicitly identify an agent- or individual-based design.
Uses CEPAC-International microsimulation without explicitly identifying it as agent- or individual-based.
Constructs an agent-based hospital simulation to evaluate bundled strategies for controlling C. difficile transmission.
Uses an epidemic microsimulation for influenza prophylaxis without explicitly identifying it as agent- or individual-based.
Builds an agent-based dialysis-unit model to evaluate antimicrobial and environmental-decontamination strategies.
Uses an HIV microsimulation to evaluate 90-90-90 but does not explicitly identify it as agent- or individual-based.
Uses the STDSIM microsimulation without explicitly identifying it as agent- or individual-based.
Uses an agent-based simulation model to assess combinations of HIV-prevention interventions in South Africa.
Uses the TELL ME agent-based model to examine protective behavior and communication during epidemics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused case study describing policy, teaching, theory-testing, and data-collection uses of agent-based modeling.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a microsimulation Markov model for serial tuberculosis testing without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Develops and uses a household-level stochastic agent-based Ebola model to assess interventions, elimination, and ring vaccination.
Develops an agent-based pertussis transmission model and uses paired simulations to evaluate outbreak-response immunization.
Builds and simulates a stochastic spatially structured individual-based SEIR model of measles outbreaks and school closure.
Constructs a Bayesian microsimulation for mastitis interventions without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Develops a discrete-event agent-based stochastic swine-herd model to evaluate PRRS control strategies.
Uses a Markov-based microsimulation for HCV treatment timing without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Uses an HPV and cervical-cancer microsimulation without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Uses individual-based disease models to quantify bias in DALY estimates when individual-level heterogeneity is ignored.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic evaluation of individual-based versus population-averaged assumptions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Adapts an HCV microsimulation without explicitly identifying it as agent- or individual-based.
Uses existing agent-based modeling software and a synthetic population to simulate measles contact tracing and interventions.
Develops cystiSim as an agent-based T. solium transmission model and makes it available as an R package.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation of an agent-based transmission model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and applies a multi-host agent-based model to fine-scale human African trypanosomiasis transmission in Zambia.
Develops a stochastic agent-based tuberculosis model reflecting household and community structure in Nunavut and evaluates interventions.
Directly compares vaccine-allocation results from an agent-based simulation and a compartmental model across epidemic scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative performance evaluation of agent-based and compartmental approaches.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes a data-driven agent-based forecasting framework, its calibration, forecast performance, and lessons from Ebola forecasting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological description of a data-driven agent-based forecasting framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based branching model to compare quarantine and symptom monitoring across seven emerging infections.
Reports use of new microsimulation models for preventive-service prioritization without explicitly identifying agent- or individual-based designs.
Uses agent-based modeling of person-to-person influenza spread to assess vaccine-choice strategies and cost-effectiveness.
Designs an agent-based regional healthcare-network model to simulate CRE transmission and LTACH-focused interventions.
Uses spatial microsimulation for lymphatic-filariasis surveillance without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Describes a novel open-source agent-based framework for simulating influenza interactions with other respiratory pathogens.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly provides an open-source agent-based implementation and extensible framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a stochastic agent-based regional swine model and uses it to evaluate surveillance strategies for emerging PRRSV strains.
Uses agent-based modeling in five US counties to evaluate influenza vaccine-choice effects and cost-effectiveness.
Provides a protocol for preparing bird, GIS, and landscape data and integrating ArcMap with AnyLogic for West Nile virus agent-based modelling.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit implementation and data-preparation protocol supporting agent-based models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an agent-based oyster model to simulate accumulation of potentially pathogenic bacteria.

Uses an ARAMIS microsimulation approach without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.

Constructs a malaria/HIV microsimulation without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Develops a cervical-cancer microsimulation without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Uses a cervical-screening microsimulation without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Uses an agent-based dynamic stochastic HIV simulation to identify combinations of care targets achieving incidence reductions.
Develops an HCV microsimulation without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Designs, validates, and uses a spatial agent-based Anopheles model to examine combined malaria-vector interventions.
Proposes a customizable agent-based queueing-theoretic framework for environment-host contact and nosocomial pathogen transfer.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological framework development named as agent-based in the title.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an agent-based hospital model and uses it to compare interventions and bundles for C. difficile control.
Uses a Markov microsimulation for school influenza vaccination without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Combines a deterministic compartmental model with a stochastic microsimulation, but does not explicitly identify an agent- or individual-based design.
Develops an HIV self-testing microsimulation without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Uses a cervical-cancer microsimulation framework without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Simulates a stochastic agent-based, multi-pathogen household system and explicitly discusses individual-based epidemic models.
Uses microsimulation of cervical-cancer disease states without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
Reviews public-health applications of agent-based modeling and directly discusses its strengths, limitations, validation needs, and future directions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological review and guidance source for agent-based modeling in public health.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based influenza model with detailed Delhi contact networks to assess slum disparities and interventions.
Develops and uses an agent-based tsetse model to study climatic drivers and sleeping-sickness transmission in Zambia.
Constructs a discrete-event, continuous-time stochastic agent-based model to simulate equine influenza and quarantine interventions.
Uses agent-based models to study human movement, malaria hotspots, and targeted control strategies in the Amazon.
Develops and uses an agent-based computer model of hog-production networks to assess disease-outbreak resilience.
Presents an innovative machine-learning approach for extending spatial agent-based disease models with adaptive risk-perception behavior.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological extension of agent-based disease models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses CEPAC-International microsimulation without explicitly identifying an agent- or individual-based design.
